hero.subtitle: The verified content marketplace for the post-AI era. Every upload is cryptographically proven authentic through C2PA — so buyers know it's real, and creators get paid for truth.

manifesto.label: Our Belief
manifesto.title: In the age of infinite fakes,
manifesto.p1: AI can now generate anything. Photos, videos, documents — all indistinguishable from reality. But that makes the {realThing} more valuable than ever.
manifesto.p2: Vericum is where authenticity is proven, not just claimed. We use C2PA standards — the same technology backed by Adobe, Google, Microsoft, and the BBC — to cryptographically verify every piece of content on our platform.

features.label: Why Vericum
features.title: Built for the Post-AI Era
features.subtitle: The first content marketplace that guarantees authenticity through cutting-edge verification technology.

c2pa.title: C2PA Verification
c2pa.description: Every upload is analyzed for C2PA manifests, EXIF data, and AI-generation markers. Know exactly where your content comes from.

provenance.title: Provenance Tracking
provenance.description: Complete chain of custody from camera to marketplace. See the full history of how content was created and edited.

marketplace.title: Fair Marketplace
marketplace.description: Sellers keep 85% of every sale. Transparent commission structure with instant payouts via Stripe Connect.

step1.title: Upload
step1.description: Drag and drop your original photo. We support JPG, PNG, WebP, TIFF, and RAW formats up to 50MB.

step2.title: Verify
step2.description: Our engine checks C2PA manifests, EXIF metadata, and runs AI detection to score authenticity — automatically.

step3.title: Sell
step3.description: Set your price and license type. Buyers purchase with confidence knowing every piece is verified.

saleTypes.label: Sale Options
saleTypes.title: Flexible Ways to Sell
saleTypes.subtitle: Choose how you want to sell your content. Two sale types to fit your strategy.

premium.title: Premium Sale
premium.description: Higher price with no secondary creation royalties. Buyers get full usage rights for their license type.

royalty.title: Royalty Sale
royalty.description: Lower price with 5-10% royalty on secondary creations. More accessible to buyers, ongoing revenue for sellers.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: No hidden fees. Sellers keep the majority of every sale.
pricing.freeVerification: Free C2PA verification on all uploads
pricing.licenseOptions: Personal, Standard, Extended & Exclusive license options

cta.label: Join the Movement
cta.title: The world needs proof.
cta.subtitle: Whether you create authentic content or need verified originals, Vericum is where truth is traded.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Start buying and selling verified content
register.success: Account created! Please check your email to confirm.

content.purchaseComplete: Purchase complete! You can now download your content.

license.standardDesc: Commercial use in a single project

settings.accountTypeDesc: Your current account role and permissions
settings.upgradeDesc: Upgrade to a seller account to upload and sell your verified content.
settings.stripeConnectDesc: Connect your Stripe account to receive payments

footer.description: Verified content marketplace powered by C2PA authenticity technology.
